data.narrative:
Stark Defence is a Series A defense & security company founded by Florian Seibel, Uwe Horstmann, and Johannes Schaback, currently valued at $500M post-money with $100M+ raised. Valuation was triangulated against a universe of 10 comparables: 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms including Vannevar Labs, Anduril Industries, and Ares Industries, all operating in Defense & Security at Series A or Series B stage.

Two methods were applied. Stage-Progression analysis applied a typical 2.0x Series A step-up multiplier to the $500M last post-money valuation, implying $1.0B. Peer-Median analysis across 9 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables yielded a median valuation of $1.0B, with a range spanning $60M to $1.5B. The peer set includes Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, and Defense Unicorns, all valued between $1.0B and $1.5B at Series B.

Both methods converge on $1.0B, supporting a triangulated range of $850M–$1.1B (low-to-high). The median sits at $1.0B. Key uncertainties include revenue trajectory and capital efficiency relative to the peer set, as well as market demand trajectory in defense technology. The relatively tight peer range ($60M–$1.5B spread) reflects stage and sector heterogeneity.
